strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_BUNGUSUNLOCKABLE_AC: Ut Enforcer, fias unum cum Bungus.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_CHARACTERUNLOCKABLE: Interfice vermem magmae, vagabundum errantem et titanem lapideum in uno cursu.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_CLASSICUNLOCKABLE_A: Ut Enforcer, ostende motus saltationis tuos.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_DESPERADOUNLOCKABLE: Ut Enforcer, vince unicam custodem Gilded Coast, pellendo eum ab margine tabulae.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_DOOMINTERNALUNLOCKA: Ut Enforcer, interfice 10 dominos imporum in uno cursu.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_DOOMUNLOCKABLE_ACHI: Ut Enforcer, interfice 20 impus in uno cursu.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_FROGUNLOCKABLE_ACHI: Ut Enforcer, inveni amicum in Luna.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_GRANDMASTERYUNLOCKA: Ut Enforcer, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon aut Eclipse.\n<color=#8888>(Quisque difficultas Typhoon aut superior computatur)</color>
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_MASTERYUNLOCKABLE_A: Ut Enforcer, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_NEMESIS2UNLOCKABLE_: Ut Enforcer in Monsoon aut altiori, stabiliva Campo Vacui et vince Enforcer Vestige.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_NEMESISSKINUNLOCKAB: Ut Enforcer, stabiliva cellam in campis vacui.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_STEVEUNLOCKABLE_ACH: Ut Enforcer, blocca impetum cum scuto tuo.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_STORMTROOPERUNLOCKA: Ut Enforcer, vince elitum Solus Control Unit.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ENFORCER_STUNGRENADEUNLOCKAB: Ut Enforcer, habe 20 hostes sub gaso lacrimogeno simul.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_NEMFORCER_DOMINANCEUNLOCKABL: Ut Nemesis Enforcer, disrupite 5 projecta simul per Dominationem.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_NEMFORCER_MASTERYUNLOCKABLE_: Ut Nemesis Enforcer, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_NEMFORCER_TYPHOONUNLOCKABLE_: Ut Nemesis Enforcer, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon aut Eclipse.\n<color=#8888>(Quisque difficultas Typhoon aut superior computatur)</color>
strings.ENFORCER_DESCRIPTION:
Enforcer est defensivus bellator, qui ictus accipere et infligere potest. <color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Riot Shotgun potest penetrare multos hostes simul. 

< ! > Pellendo hostes cum Shield Bash, certas hostes procul esse. 

< ! > Utere gaso lacrimogeno ut debilites magnas turbae, tunc approxima et contere eos.

< ! > Cum potes, utere Protect et Serve contra muros ne hostes te circumveniant.
strings.ENFORCER_LORE:
<style=cMono> "Non debes hoc facere."</style>

Verba resonabant in capite eius, sed propulsus est ante. Capsula solum paucis passibus abs erat - habuit opportunitatem abeundi - sed aliquid intus eum movebat tenuit. Nescivit quid erat, sed non quaesivit. Erat vis naturalis: eadem vis quae eum semper coegit obtemperare mandatis.

Hoc tamen tempore non ita naturale visum est. Nulla mandata erant. Gravis trigger et eius rhythmicus tonitrus ad eum pertinebant - et solum ad eum.
strings.ENFORCER_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic evanuit, et minoritates planetae tandem pacem habuerunt.
strings.ENFORCER_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, incertus de suo titulo protectoris.
strings.ENFORCER_PRIMARY_HAMMER_DESCRIPTION: Agita malleum tuum pro <style=cIsDamage>500% vulneris</style>.\nUten Protect et Serve, agita in <style=cIsUtility>maiorem aream</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>1000% vulneris</style>.
strings.ENFORCER_PRIMARY_RIFLE_DESCRIPTION: Diminte pluviam globorum pro <style=cIsDamage>130% vulneris</style>.\nUten Protect et Serve, habet <style=cIsDamage>auctam praecisionem</style>, sed <style=cIsHealth>minorem celeritatem motus</style>.
strings.ENFORCER_PRIMARY_SHOTGUN_DESCRIPTION: Puga crepitem brevis distantiae qui <style=cIsUtility>penetrat</style>, infligens <style=cIsDamage>6x60% vulneris.</style>
strings.ENFORCER_PRIMARY_SHOTGUN_NAME_UPGRADE_DE: <style=cIsUtility>+5%</style> vulnus, <style=cIsUtility>+10%</style> crassitudo globi et <style=cIsUtility>+0,1</style> disseminatio globi
strings.ENFORCER_PRIMARY_SUPERSHOTGUN_DESCRIPTIO: Puga usque ad 2 ictus sclopi pro <style=cIsDamage>8x80% vulneris</style>.\nUten Protect et Serve, puga <style=cIsDamage>ex utroque tubo simul.</style>
strings.ENFORCER_SECONDARY_BASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Stuporifice</style>. Pelle hostes, infligens <style=cIsDamage>350% vulneris</style> et <style=cIsUtility>averte projecta</style>.\nDum <style=cIsUtility>currit</style>, potius fac <style=cIsDamage>Ictum Umeri</style>.
strings.ENFORCER_SPECIAL_SHIELDDOWN_DESCRIPTION: Ingredere defensionem, <style=cIsUtility>bloccans omne vulnus a fronte</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Augat celeritatem impugnationis</style>, sed <style=cIsHealth>impedit cursus et saltus</style>.
strings.ENFORCER_SPECIAL_SHIELDOFF_DESCRIPTION: Ingredere defensionem, <style=cIsUtility>proiiciens scutum energiae ante te</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Augat tuum celeritatem sclopi</style>, sed <style=cIsUtility>impedit cursus et saltus</style>.
strings.ENFORCER_SPECIAL_SHIELDON_DESCRIPTION: Ingredere defensionem, <style=cIsUtility>proiiciens scutum energiae ante te</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Augat tuum celeritatem sclopi</style>, sed <style=cIsUtility>impedit cursus et saltus</style>.
strings.ENFORCER_SPECIAL_SHIELDUP_DESCRIPTION: Ingredere defensionem, <style=cIsUtility>bloccans omne vulnus a fronte</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Firmat primarium pugnam</style>, sed <style=cIsHealth>impedit cursus et saltus</style>.
strings.ENFORCER_UTILITY_SHOCKGRENADE_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsDamage>Expavescens</style>. Iacta grenadam quae hostes fulgure percutit, infligens <style=cIsDamage>720% vulneris</style>. Tene usque ad 3.
strings.ENFORCER_UTILITY_STUNGRENADE_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Stuporifice</style>. Iacta grenadam quae hostes percutit, infligens <style=cIsDamage>540% vulneris</style>. Tene usque ad 3.
strings.ENFORCER_UTILITY_TEARGAS_DESCRIPTION: Iacta grenadam quae operit aream cum <style=cIsDamage>Impairing</style> gaso.
strings.ENFORCER_UTILITY_TEARGASSCEPTER_DESCRIPT: Iacta grenadam quae operit aream cum <style=cIsDamage>Impairing</style> gaso, suffocans hostes, infligens <style=cIsDamage>200% vulneris per secundam</style>.
strings.KEYWORD_BLINDED: <style=cKeywordName>Impaired</style><style=cSub>Minue celeritatem motus <style=cIsDamage>75%</style>, celeritatem impugnationis <style=cIsDamage>25%</style> et loricam <style=cIsDamage>30</style>.</style></style>
strings.KEYWORD_SLAM: <style=cKeywordName>Ictus Descendens</style><style=cIsDamage>Stuporificus.</style> Saeviter <style=cIsHealth>descende</style> cum malleo tuo, infligens <style=cIsDamage>300%-2500% vulneris</style> et additur <style=cIsDamage>30%</style> huius ictus. <style=cIsUtility>Radius ictus scalatur cum celeritate.</style>
strings.KEYWORD_SPRINTBASH: <style=cKeywordName>Shoulder Bash</style><style=cSub><style=cIsDamage>Stuporificus.</style> Brevis impetus qui infligit <style=cIsDamage>450% vulneris</style>.\nIctus contra <style=cIsDamage>graviorem hostem</style> infligit <style=cIsDamage>700% vulneris</style>.
strings.NEMFORCER_DESCRIPTION:
Nemesis Enforcer est incarnatio virtutis et roboris, generis supernaturalis quod nemo leviter accipit.<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Malleus aureus potest percutere multos hostes simul.

< ! > Utere Dominatione ex altitudine ad vastas actiones. ictus.

< ! > Pugnatio cum mitrali aureo clavis est ad destruendos potentes duces.

< ! > Scuta pro cattis.
strings.NEMFORCER_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic rediit, bastio infallibilis, vere immortalis.
strings.NEMFORCER_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, cum nuper inventa virtute honorandi.
strings.NEMFORCER_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Nemesis Enforcer accipit <style=cIsHealing>additam valetudinis restaurationem</style> definitam super eius currentem <style=cIsHealth>valetudinem absentem</style>, usque ad <style=cIsHealth>2,5% maximam valetudinem</style>.
strings.NEMFORCER_PASSIVE_REWORK_DESCRIPTION: Nemesis Enforcer restaurat <style=cIsHealing>2%</style> suae <style=cIsHealing>maximae valetudinis</style> per 3s dum percutit hostes cum <style=cIsDamage>impugnationibus proelii propinqui</style>.
strings.NEMFORCER_PRIMARY_MINIGUN_DESCRIPTION: Auge celeritatem et puga pluviam globorum, infligens <style=cIsDamage>65% vulneris</style> per globum. <style=cIsUtility>Tardat motum durant pugnam.</style>
strings.NEMFORCER_SECONDARY_BASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Onerare</style>, tunc salta ante et utere <style=cIsDamage>crescentem ictum ascendentem</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>450%-2500% vulneris</style>. Utere dum <style=cIsUtility>cadit et aspicit deorsum</style> ad faciendum <style=cIsUtility>Ictum Descendentem</style>.
strings.NEMFORCER_SECONDARY_SLAM_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Stuporifice.</style> Exsistens in statu mitrali, saeviter <style=cIsHealth>percutite</style> cum malleo, infligens <style=cIsDamage>600% vulneris</style> et <style=cIsDamage>pellendo</style> hostes percutiti. <style=cIsUtility>Disrumpit projecta.</style>
strings.NEMFORCER_SPECIAL_MINIGUNUP_DESCRIPTION: Ingredere positionem aggressivam, <style=cIsDamage>parans tuam mitralem</style>. <style=cIsHealth>Impedit cursus</style>.
strings.NEMFORCER_UTILITY_CRASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Grappling.</style> Salta in aerem, tunc tunde, infligens <style=cIsDamage>2400% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Minuit vulnus extra centrum ictus.</style>
strings.NEMFORCER_UTILITY_GAS_DESCRIPTION: Iacta grenadam quae explodit in nubem <style=cIsUtility>gasis corrosivi</style>, quae <style=cIsUtility>tardat</style> et infligit <style=cIsDamage>200% vulneris per secundam</style> et durat <style=cIsDamage>16 secundas</style>.
strings.NEMFORCER_UTILITY_JUMP_DESCRIPTION: Salta in aerem, tunc tunde, infligens <style=cIsDamage>3200% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Minuit vulnus extra centrum ictus.</style>
